checks.text: Colors, radii, and spacing trace to shadcn CSS variables (no raw hex/px literals).
Corner rounding uses --radius scale, consistent across cards/buttons/inputs.
Neutral, restrained palette — no default-average purple gradient hero.
Text meets WCAG AA contrast in both light and dark.
Interactive elements show a visible --ring focus state.
One clear focal point per screen; intentional emphasis.
Spacing rhythm from the 4/8px scale, not eyeballed gaps.
